title: Team Profile — Derek Vasquez, Lead Engineer
author: alice.chen
content:
TEAM PROFILE: Derek Vasquez
Role: Lead Engineer | Team: Engineering | Email: derek.vasquez@novaloop.io

Responsibilities:
- Owns backend architecture for Checkout AI Assistant
- Leads API design and integration contracts
- Coordinates with Design and Product on feature specs
- Primary escalation contact for engineering blockers

Current assignments (Launch Alpha Sprint 4):
- NOVA-142 (BLOCKED, critical): Launch page v2 checkout API integration
  Owner and assignee. Filed 2026-04-25 after overnight API migration.
- NOVA-139 (Done): Gemini summarization for checkout flow
  Completed 2026-04-24. Merged to main.

Recent activity:
- 2026-04-25 02:18 — Posted #engineering alert about /v1→/v2 API migration
- 2026-04-25 09:05 — Responded to Alice's status check: 'Still blocked. Fix in progress.'
- Lead on call for launch weekend (2026-04-26 through 2026-04-28)

Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Gemini API, payment integrations
